name: campaign-wargame
description: War-game your campaigns before you launch them — fight the plan on paper first. Five review roles (researcher, devil's advocate, ripple-effects, opportunity scout, reviewer) stress-test campaign plans, drip flows, segments, offers, and creative batches: what could go wrong, what it costs, what to watch mid-flight, and when to stop. Built for the Yobo operations team — no coding required.
